task: M3 phase 2: implement remaining 3 国云 native drivers (providers/tencent + providers/huawei + providers/volcengine) using the alibaba commit (78dd457) as reference and the cross-vendor lessons captured in its commit message. All consume pkg/uos/s3common; all skip RunSuite-by-default (vendor SDK ≠ AWS SigV4); all gate cloud-nightly env vars per OMC_<VENDOR>_NIGHTLY_*. Update matrix + CHANGELOG + RELEASING. Tag commands maintainer-gated.
scope_note: Phase 2 of M3. Tags providers/<name>/v0.1.0 are maintainer-gated per RELEASING.md §4. M4 (GCS+Azure) is the next session's work.

stories.title: providers/tencent native driver (cos-go-sdk-v5)
acceptanceCriteria: providers/tencent/ scaffolded via scripts/add-provider.sh tencent (go.mod with module github.com/maqian/object-storage-client/providers/tencent + parent + testkit requires + replace directives).
providers/tencent/go.mod requires github.com/tencentyun/cos-go-sdk-v5 directly; no other cloud SDKs.

factory.go implements uos.Factory: Provider() = 'tencent'; Validate requires Region+CredentialProvider (Tencent COS bucket name MUST contain `-<appid>` suffix — document this in Validate's doc comment, but DO NOT enforce since DriverConfig.AppID may have set it); Open builds the COS BaseURL from region+optional appid + custom endpoint, configures HMAC creds, disables SDK retryer.

driver.go implements full uos.Client + 4 sub-services using cos-go-sdk-v5. Multipart via Object.InitiateMultipartUpload/UploadPart/CompleteMultipartUpload/AbortMultipartUpload (bypasses transfer.Manager per M2 + Uploader contract).
Metadata key prefix: x-cos-meta-* (use s3common.LowerMetadataKeys for case-folding; strip/add prefix per direction).
Signer.SignURL via cos-go-sdk-v5's GetPresignedURL. Signer.IssueDirectGrant returns ErrUnsupported{CapDirectGrant} per matrix footnote 5.
error_map.go uses s3common.MapCodeString → MapHTTPStatus → MapContextErr → ErrInternal decision tree on top of cos-go-sdk-v5's *cos.ErrorResponse extraction. Pass through any pre-existing *uos.Error.
capabilities.go returns the 13-cell Report matching the tencent column shape: 9 ✅ / 1 ❌ / 2 🟡 / 1 🧩 (same as aws+minio+alibaba — S3-family).

driver_test.go (//go:build docker): TestRunSuite SKIPs by default (cos signature ≠ SigV4); cloud-nightly env vars OMC_TENCENT_NIGHTLY_KEY/_SECRET/_BUCKET/_REGION/_APPID gate the real-COS contract suite. TestSpawnMinIOSmoke runs in PR gate (validates testkit wiring).
From providers/tencent: go build / go vet / gofmt -l . silent. From root: TestFrozenSurface 3 subtests pass (no Code/Cap added).
Report any tencent-specific S3-compat error codes NOT in s3common.MapCodeString — lead will extend s3common in a follow-up if any surface.

stories.title: providers/huawei native driver (huaweicloud-sdk-go-obs)
acceptanceCriteria: providers/huawei/ scaffolded; go.mod requires github.com/huaweicloud/huaweicloud-sdk-go-obs directly.

factory.go implements uos.Factory: Provider() = 'huawei'; Validate requires Endpoint (region/endpoint pairing is strict per provider_roadmap.md M3 risk note — incorrect pairing causes silent 301/307 redirects); Open builds the OBS Client with HMAC creds, custom endpoint, disabled SDK retryer.

driver.go implements full uos.Client + 4 sub-services using huaweicloud-sdk-go-obs. Multipart via the OBS native primitives (InitiateMultipartUpload/UploadPart/CompleteMultipartUpload/AbortMultipartUpload). Bypasses transfer.Manager.
Metadata key prefix: x-obs-meta-* (use s3common.LowerMetadataKeys; strip/add per direction).
Signer.SignURL via OBS's signed URL helper. Signer.IssueDirectGrant returns ErrUnsupported{CapDirectGrant}.
error_map.go uses the s3common decision tree on top of obs.ObsError extraction.
capabilities.go returns the 13-cell Report matching huawei column (S3-family default shape — 9 ✅ / 1 ❌ / 2 🟡 / 1 🧩).
driver_test.go (//go:build docker): TestRunSuite SKIPs by default; OMC_HUAWEI_NIGHTLY_* env vars gate real-OBS contract. TestSpawnMinIOSmoke runs in PR gate.
From providers/huawei: go build / go vet / gofmt -l . silent. TestFrozenSurface still passes.
Report any OBS-specific error codes NOT in s3common.MapCodeString.

stories.title: providers/volcengine native driver (ve-tos-golang-sdk/v2/tos)
acceptanceCriteria: providers/volcengine/ scaffolded; go.mod requires github.com/volcengine/ve-tos-golang-sdk/v2 directly.
factory.go implements uos.Factory: Provider() = 'volcengine'; Validate requires Region+CredentialProvider; Open builds the TOS Client with HMAC creds + custom endpoint, disabled SDK retryer.
driver.go implements full uos.Client + 4 sub-services using ve-tos-golang-sdk/v2/tos. Multipart via TOS native primitives. Bypasses transfer.Manager.
Metadata key prefix: x-tos-meta-*.
Signer.SignURL via tos.PreSignedURL. IssueDirectGrant returns ErrUnsupported{CapDirectGrant}.
Storage class strings: TOS uses STANDARD/IA/ARCHIVE_FR/ARCHIVE — pass through opaquely; the unified StorageClass field accepts the vendor's literal.
error_map.go uses the s3common decision tree on top of tos.TosServerError extraction.
capabilities.go returns the 13-cell Report (S3-family shape).
driver_test.go (//go:build docker): TestRunSuite SKIPs by default; OMC_VOLCENGINE_NIGHTLY_* env vars gate real-TOS contract. TestSpawnMinIOSmoke runs in PR gate.
From providers/volcengine: go build / go vet / gofmt -l . silent. TestFrozenSurface still passes.
Report any TOS-specific error codes NOT in s3common.MapCodeString.

stories.title: Matrix update + CHANGELOG/RELEASING/AGENTS for the 3 new providers
acceptanceCriteria: docs/provider_matrix.md: tencent + huawei + volcengine driver-status rows updated to 'Shipped (v0.1.0)'.

docs/provider_matrix.md: 13 capability rows × 3 columns (tencent + huawei + volcengine) updated from ⏳M3 placeholders to actual symbols matching each driver's capabilities() return. Same 9 ✅ / 1 ❌⁵ / 2 🟡 / 1 🧩¹² shape as alibaba/aws/minio.

CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] gains entries for providers/tencent/v0.1.0, providers/huawei/v0.1.0, providers/volcengine/v0.1.0 — each summarising SDK choice, cross-vendor SDK pattern reuse, and any vendor-specific s3common extension if applicable.
RELEASING.md §4: provider tag commands extended to include providers/tencent/v0.1.0, providers/huawei/v0.1.0, providers/volcengine/v0.1.0.
AGENTS.md if any architectural follow-up surfaced (e.g., new s3common gap-fill for additional vendor codes), update item 4 accordingly.
If any of the 3 drivers surfaced new S3-family error codes not in s3common.MapCodeString, extend the s3common table + tests in this same change-set (don't defer to a separate commit).
